_comment: GENERATED by meta/build-contract.mjs from `true-up capabilities` — do not hand-edit. The steward true-up trues ITSELF against: docs derive-facts-from these command and agent-guidance facts via .true-up.json seed (marker-free).

commands.name: --check
commands.summary: stale-graph gate (working-tree, or committed-blob drift gate)

commands.name: --impact
commands.summary: who is made stale (unknown target → exit 2, not a false "0 dependents")

commands.name: gate
commands.summary: one CI stage: --check + --policy + --externalities; nonzero on any failure

commands.name: graph
commands.summary: READ-ONLY full graph dump (nodes, audiences/zones, edges, propagation, via); writes nothing

commands.name: hooks
commands.summary: wire/remove a per-repo pre-commit+pre-push gate (REFUSES a shared/out-of-repo hooks dir without --force; --uninstall restores any backup), or print a CI snippet

commands.name: init
commands.summary: scaffold a starter .true-up.json (idempotent: no-op if one exists)

commands.name: robot-docs
commands.summary: paste-ready in-tool agent handbook (task→command recipes); writes nothing

commands.name: status
commands.summary: READ-ONLY orientation in ONE call: built/stale, what is stale, policy/leak status, + nextCommands[]. Always exit 0 (a probe, not a gate).

agent_guidance.name: declared-seed-edge
agent_guidance.summary: config "seed": [{ "from": "doc.md", "to": "src/app.py#parse_config", "kind": "derives-facts-from" }] declares a marker-free edge; "to" may be a whole file or path#fact (JSON key, span id, or tree-sitter symbol); use kind "generated-from" plus required "via" for marker-free mechanical generated artifacts (via is a tracked in-repo generator path; JS runs with node, shell/python/ruby/perl by extension, extensionless/shebang directly); bad endpoints fail loud
